name: Copernicium
appearance: A highly radioactive metal, of which only a few atoms have ever been made. It is thought to be unreactive and more like a noble gas than a metal.
uses: At present, it is only used in research.
naturalAbundance: Copernicium is a man-made element of which only a few atoms have ever been made. It is formed by fusing lead and zinc atoms in a heavy ion accelerator.
biologicalRole: It has no known biological role.
